seoTitle: Comara vs Combara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Comara and Combara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Comara and Combara.
heading: Comara vs Combara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Comara, New South Wales and Combara, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Combara has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Comara (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Comara or Combara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Comara has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Combara scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Comara scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Combara scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Comara or Combara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Combara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
